title: UsefulHUDs
description: Just some useful huds for Minecraft
body:
# UsefulHuds
Useful Huds for Minecraft!

## Available HUDs
- FPS (Based on: [FPS-Display](https://github.com/Grayray75/FPS-Display/tree/main))
- SprintToggledDisplay (Based on: [toggle-sprint-display](https://github.com/Aeltumn/toggle-sprint-display))

## To-do list
- Coordinates display
- Armor display
- Keystrokes display
